get.description: Returns a paginated list of campaigns. Supports partial matching for name, and filtering by status.

post.description: Creates a clipping campaign. Defaults to draft; set status to active to launch on creation.

get.description: Returns a single campaign by UUID.

Returns a paginated list of clip submissions for a campaign. Supports filtering by status and platform, with sorting by views, likes, comments, post date, or submit date. Optionally search by a specific field (clip_url, social_handle, creator_username, creator_discord_id) using partial matching.

post.description: Imports one or more clip URLs into a campaign. Fails if a URL is a duplicate submission or from an unsupported platform.
Attaches an existing content vault folder to a campaign so its assets are associated with that campaign. Re-linking the same folder updates its publicity type.
post.summary: Link a content vault folder to a campaign

post.description: Reserves a content vault asset and returns a signed URL to upload the file bytes directly to storage. Call the finalize endpoint once the upload completes.
Confirms that the file bytes were uploaded to storage and marks the asset ready (or failed). Triggers AI analysis on success.
Creates a content vault folder. Pass parentFolderId to nest it under an existing folder, or null for the vault root. Set replaceExisting to overwrite a same-named folder under the same parent.
Imports the files behind a Google Drive or Dropbox shared link into the content vault as a background job. Returns a jobId to poll for status.
Lists the importable files and folders behind a Google Drive or Dropbox shared link, without importing anything.

get.description: Returns the progress of a background import job (pending / processing / completed / failed) with per-file counts.
Returns a paginated list of creators. Supports sorting by username, name, email, join date, or role. Optionally search by a specific field (username, name, email, discord_id) using partial matching.
Returns a paginated list of creator performance statistics. Supports sorting by username, total clips, approved clips, approval rate, total views, approved views, or total earnings.
Returns a single creator by UUID.
Returns performance statistics for a single creator by UUID
Returns a paginated list of tracking campaigns. Supports filtering by status and sorting by name, status, creation date, or visibility.
Returns a single tracking campaign by UUID.

Returns a paginated list of clip submissions for a tracking campaign. Supports filtering by content status, platform, creator UUID, and clip URL, with sorting by views, likes, comments, post date, or submit date. Platform and clip URL filters only match submissions with linked clips.

post.description: Imports one or more content URLs into a tracking campaign. Fails if a URL is a duplicate submission or from an unsupported platform.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of creators who joined a tracking campaign. Supports sorting by join date, email, name, or username. Optionally search by a specific field (email, name, username) using partial matching.
